title: anchusa azurea
intro: Anchusa azurea, also known as Italian bugloss, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Anchusa azurea include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Anchusa azurea typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed orally or used topically as a compress.
